_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design/integrate a cyber strategy that outlines the vision, mission, and goals that align with the organization's strategic plan.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy formulation methods, alignment with enterprise business strategy, competitive positioning through data capabilities, and strategy communication frameworks.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.486), LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.485).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.369). Shared vocabulary: [strategy]. DCWF-only terms [align, cyber, design, goals, integrate, mission] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.882, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (93.9%). "Design/integrate a cyber strategy that outlines the vision, mission, and goals t" and "Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 > STS 0.369 (gap +0.121). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [strategy] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [strategy]. DCWF-only: [align, cyber, design, goals, integrate, mission]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.121 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
